current_focus: Test coverage expansion — E2E, integration, component tests
recent_insights: Fixed stats.py ai_win_rate bug: was multiplying by 100 but schema constrains to ≤1.0
Fixed conftest.py: models must be imported before Base.metadata.create_all (SQLite in-memory has empty metadata otherwise)
Added StaticPool + check_same_thread=False for SQLite in-memory test engine
E2E mock server approach: page.route() only intercepts browser-side fetches, not SSR server-side fetches — created real HTTP mock server on port 8000
17 backend integration tests covering leaderboard, throughput, stats, failures, corrections, outcomes, release
63 paper component tests (score-bar, significance-memo, corrections, expert-reviews, novelty-check, autonomy-card, submission-history, citation-export, share-buttons)
36 Playwright E2E tests across 9 new spec files covering paper-detail, failures, reliability, corrections, outcomes, rsi, rsi-experiments, categories, category-detail
handoff: Test coverage expansion complete. Backend 271→288 (+17 integration). Frontend 102→165 (+63 paper component tests). E2E 28→64 (+36 browser tests). All suites green, 0 regressions, build clean. One real bug fixed in stats.py (ai_win_rate × 100 overflow). Next priorities: (1) expand E2E coverage to remaining flows, (2) add more integration test scenarios, (3) performance/load testing.
